Led end-to-end development of 3 production iOS applications, managing full SDLC from requirements to App Store release, implementing MVVM (SwiftUI/UIKit) and improving client satisfaction by 50%.

97%+ accuracy achieved; promoted to QA after 95% error reduction, demonstrating strong attention to detail.
